# openwrt-core module
> OpenWrt buildroot core packages: early boot firmware, kernel module infrastructure, and base-files.
> **Total Context:** ~23147 tokens

## Recommended Entry Points

- [map.md](./map.md): Structural map for openwrt-core that prioritizes quick orientation and symbol discovery. (~2231 tokens, l3-skeleton)
- [bundled-reference.md](./bundled-reference.md): Complete monolithic reference for openwrt-core when a larger context window is available. (~24828 tokens, l4-monolith)

## Source Documents

- [makefile_meta-category-boot.md](./chunked-reference/makefile_meta-category-boot.md): The OpenWrt Buildroot boot packages module provides essential firmware components required for the boot process of various ARM-based devices. (~3710 tokens, l2-source)
- [makefile_meta-category-firmware.md](./chunked-reference/makefile_meta-category-firmware.md): OpenWrt Buildroot: firmware packages > **Source:** https://github.com/openwrt/openwrt/tree/master/package/firmware --- ath10k-ct-firmware Alternative ath10k firmware for QCA9887 from Candela Technologies. (~1435 tokens, l2-source)
- [makefile_meta-category-kernel.md](./chunked-reference/makefile_meta-category-kernel.md): The OpenWrt Buildroot kernel packages module provides a collection of kernel-related packages essential for various hardware functionalities. (~2744 tokens, l2-source)
- [makefile_meta-category-libs.md](./chunked-reference/makefile_meta-category-libs.md): OpenWrt Buildroot: libs packages > **Source:** https://github.com/openwrt/openwrt/tree/master/package/libs --- argp-standalone GNU libc hierarchial argument parsing library broken out from glibc. (~5280 tokens, l2-source)
- [makefile_meta-category-system.md](./chunked-reference/makefile_meta-category-system.md): The OpenWrt Buildroot system packages module provides a collection of essential packages for system management and functionality within the OpenWrt environment. (~2031 tokens, l2-source)
- [makefile_meta-category-utils.md](./chunked-reference/makefile_meta-category-utils.md): The OpenWrt Buildroot utils packages module provides a collection of utility tools and libraries for embedded Linux systems. (~5864 tokens, l2-source)
- [makefile_meta-include-mk.md](./chunked-reference/makefile_meta-include-mk.md): The OpenWrt Buildroot includes a collection of Makefile fragments that are essential for the build system. (~2083 tokens, l2-source)
